test_patch:
diff --git a/test/units/plugins/connection/test_winrm.py b/test/units/plugins/connection/test_winrm.py
index d5b76ca8f2..b4ab40556e 100644
--- a/test/units/plugins/connection/test_winrm.py
+++ b/test/units/plugins/connection/test_winrm.py
@@ -364,8 +364,7 @@ class TestWinRMKerbAuth(object):
             conn._kerb_auth("invaliduser", "pass")
 
         assert str(err.value) == \
-            "Kerberos auth failure for principal invaliduser with " \
-            "subprocess: %s" % (expected_err)
+            "Kerberos auth failure for principal invaliduser: %s" % (expected_err)
 
     def test_kinit_error_pexpect(self, monkeypatch):
         pytest.importorskip("pexpect")
@@ -411,7 +410,7 @@ class TestWinRMKerbAuth(object):
         with pytest.raises(AnsibleConnectionFailure) as err:
             conn._kerb_auth("username", "password")
         assert str(err.value) == \
-            "Kerberos auth failure for principal username with subprocess: " \
+            "Kerberos auth failure for principal username: " \
             "Error with kinit\n<redacted>"
 
     def test_kinit_error_pass_in_output_pexpect(self, monkeypatch):
@@ -439,6 +438,94 @@ class TestWinRMKerbAuth(object):
             "Kerberos auth failure for principal username with pexpect: " \
             "Error with kinit\n<redacted>"
 
+    def test_kinit_start_new_session(self, monkeypatch):
+        def mock_communicate(input=None, timeout=None):
+            return b"", b""
+        mock_popen = MagicMock()
+        mock_popen.return_value.communicate = mock_communicate
+        mock_popen.return_value.returncode = 0
+        monkeypatch.setattr("subprocess.Popen", mock_popen)
+        pc = PlayContext()
+        new_stdin = StringIO()
+        conn = connection_loader.get("winrm", pc, new_stdin)
+        conn.set_options(var_options={"_extras": {}})
+        conn._build_winrm_kwargs()
+        conn._kerb_auth("user@domain", "pass")
+        call_kwargs = mock_popen.call_args[1]
+        assert call_kwargs.get("start_new_session") is True
+
+    def test_kinit_password_raw_bytes(self, monkeypatch):
+        captured = {}
+        def mock_communicate(input=None, timeout=None):
+            captured["input"] = input
+            return b"", b""
+        mock_popen = MagicMock()
+        mock_popen.return_value.communicate = mock_communicate
+        mock_popen.return_value.returncode = 0
+        monkeypatch.setattr("subprocess.Popen", mock_popen)
+        pc = PlayContext()
+        new_stdin = StringIO()
+        conn = connection_loader.get("winrm", pc, new_stdin)
+        conn.set_options(var_options={"_extras": {}})
+        conn._build_winrm_kwargs()
+        conn._kerb_auth("user@domain", "testpass")
+        assert captured["input"] == b"testpass"
+
+    def test_kinit_timeout_value(self, monkeypatch):
+        captured = {}
+        def mock_communicate(input=None, timeout=None):
+            captured["timeout"] = timeout
+            return b"", b""
+        mock_popen = MagicMock()
+        mock_popen.return_value.communicate = mock_communicate
+        mock_popen.return_value.returncode = 0
+        monkeypatch.setattr("subprocess.Popen", mock_popen)
+        pc = PlayContext()
+        new_stdin = StringIO()
+        conn = connection_loader.get("winrm", pc, new_stdin)
+        conn.set_options(var_options={"_extras": {}})
+        conn._build_winrm_kwargs()
+        conn._kerb_auth("user@domain", "pass")
+        assert captured["timeout"] == 30
+
+    def test_kinit_timeout_cleanup_sequence(self, monkeypatch):
+        import subprocess
+        mock_popen_instance = MagicMock()
+        mock_popen_instance.pid = 12345
+        def mock_communicate(input=None, timeout=None):
+            raise subprocess.TimeoutExpired("kinit", 30)
+        mock_popen_instance.communicate = mock_communicate
+        mock_popen_instance.returncode = -9
+        mock_popen = MagicMock(return_value=mock_popen_instance)
+        monkeypatch.setattr("subprocess.Popen", mock_popen)
+        pc = PlayContext()
+        new_stdin = StringIO()
+        conn = connection_loader.get("winrm", pc, new_stdin)
+        conn.set_options(var_options={"_extras": {}})
+        conn._build_winrm_kwargs()
+        with pytest.raises(AnsibleConnectionFailure):
+            conn._kerb_auth("user@domain", "pass")
+        mock_popen_instance.kill.assert_called_once_with()
+        mock_popen_instance.wait.assert_called_once_with()
+        mock_popen_instance.terminate.assert_not_called()
+
+    def test_kinit_path_env_default(self, monkeypatch):
+        monkeypatch.delenv("PATH", raising=False)
+        def mock_communicate(input=None, timeout=None):
+            return b"", b""
+        mock_popen = MagicMock()
+        mock_popen.return_value.communicate = mock_communicate
+        mock_popen.return_value.returncode = 0
+        monkeypatch.setattr("subprocess.Popen", mock_popen)
+        pc = PlayContext()
+        new_stdin = StringIO()
+        conn = connection_loader.get("winrm", pc, new_stdin)
+        conn.set_options(var_options={"_extras": {}})
+        conn._build_winrm_kwargs()
+        conn._kerb_auth("user@domain", "pass")
+        call_kwargs = mock_popen.call_args[1]
+        assert call_kwargs["env"]["PATH"] == ""
+
     def test_exec_command_with_timeout(self, monkeypatch):
         requests_exc = pytest.importorskip("requests.exceptions")
